name: set_part
short_description: Sets the part on the current project. If no project is open, then a diskless project is created.
full_help:
set_part

Description: 
Sets the part on the current project. If no project is open, then a diskless project is created.

Syntax: 
set_part  [-quiet] [-verbose] <part>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <part>      Set current project's part to this part.

Categories: 
Project, PropertyAndParameter

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
